name: TATTOO ARTIST | Ambrose
description:
|| Maybe you're a veteran or a newbie to tattoos. Anyway, you decided to have a tattoo on your inner thigh. Lured by your friend's judgment and local population, you went to this tattoo artist that well.. has quite the standoffish expression.||

• || I'm on Erasmus right now and I barely have the time to shower, I'll be away for like 3 months from my home country so sorry if I'm inactive ||
